name: SSM LRU Baseline (WIP)
author: Timothy Wang
blurb: First SSM (state space model) submission to parameter golf. Uses a Linear Recurrent Unit (LRU) with complex diagonal recurrence and parallel scan via cumulative sums. Gated input projection + ReLU^2 MLP per block. MuonAdamW optimizer with SSM-aware param groups. WIP — seeking compute credits to validate on H100.
